name: [BUG-ANA-001] TC-ANA-001 — Spring Boot Whitelabel page leaks EAT server timezone on every 406
description:
**[BUG-ANA-001]** When GET /rms-analytics/api/v1/analytics/dashboard/summary is called with `Accept: text/html`, the server returns 406 Not Acceptable but the body is a Spring Boot Whitelabel Error Page: ```html

Whitelabel Error Page

...
Tue Jun 09 15:24:09 EAT 2026
... ``` **Information leaked:** 1. Spring Boot framework (confirms Java stack) 2. Server timezone: **EAT** (East Africa Time, UTC+3) — reveals the server's geographic region 3. Exact server timestamp at time of request 4. Internal URL path: `/api/v1/analytics/dashboard/summary` **Expected:** 406 with a JSON error body (`{"status":406,"error":"Not Acceptable","message":"..."}`) **Fix:** Register a global `HttpMediaTypeNotAcceptableException` handler that returns JSON.
descriptionHtml:
[BUG-ANA-001]

When GET /rms-analytics/api/v1/analytics/dashboard/summary is called with Accept: text/html, the server returns 406 Not Acceptable but the body is a Spring Boot Whitelabel Error Page:

<html><body><h1>Whitelabel Error Page</h1>...
<div id='created'>Tue Jun 09 15:24:09 EAT 2026</div>...

Information leaked:

  1. Spring Boot framework (confirms Java stack)
  2. Server timezone: EAT (East Africa Time, UTC+3) — reveals the server's geographic region
  3. Exact server timestamp at time of request
  4. Internal URL path: /api/v1/analytics/dashboard/summary

Expected: 406 with a JSON error body ({"status":406,"error":"Not Acceptable","message":"..."})

Fix: Register a global HttpMediaTypeNotAcceptableException handler that returns JSON.
statusMessage:
Error: [BUG-ANA-001] 406 must NOT expose Spring Boot Whitelabel page

expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality

Expected: false
Received: true
statusTrace:
Error: [BUG-ANA-001] 406 must NOT expose Spring Boot Whitelabel page

expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality

Expected: false
Received: true
